caption: A man sits in a studio setting, wearing a white dress shirt, tan suspenders, a bow tie, and a tall, spiked grey wig. He wears glasses and over-ear headphones. In front of him is a professional microphone on a boom arm. Behind him, the wall is decorated with numerous small, framed photographs. To his right, clothing items on hangers are visible, including a piece of apparel with the word "LEE" printed on it. The "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" logo appears on the screen in two locations. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and speaks, with his facial expressions and mouth movements changing as he talks. He shifts his gaze slightly, looking forward and then slightly downward, while his posture remains relatively still.
